name: fresh-retry
prediction: converts a fraction of outcome-loop aborts into passes on failure-heavy (model,task) pairs — fresh context removes the failed-attempt residue that anchors retries (12-factor dumb-zone). Structurally do-no-harm: the retry fires only where the alternative was certain failure; the Fisher question is whether the gain justifies the extra session cost. retried:1 rows carry the mechanism metric.
